description: A classic brunch dish of toasted English muffins topped with Canadian bacon or ham, poached eggs, and hollandaise sauce. It is rich, savory, and usually served warm.
preparation_steps: Toast the English muffins and warm the meat if using.
Prepare or warm the hollandaise sauce.
Assemble muffins, meat, eggs, and sauce.

health_advice.benefits: Provides protein from eggs and meat and can be satisfying as a brunch meal.
health_advice.risks: Often high in saturated fat and calories because of hollandaise sauce and butter.
health_advice.healthy_tip: For a lighter version, reduce the sauce portion and add vegetables such as spinach.

dietary_notes.note: Vegetarian versions exist, but the classic version includes ham or Canadian bacon.
